page.title: Companies / tenants
page.subtitle: Super admin: create companies (tenants), edit metadata, and impersonate for support.
page.listHelp: Each company (tenant) has its own products, registers, and receipts.

accessDenied.title: Access denied
accessDenied.body: Only super administrators may open this page.

provisioning.title: Tenant “{{name}}” provisioned
provisioning.passwordWarning: The admin password is shown only once. Store it securely or hand it off to the tenant.
provisioning.nextStepLogin: Sign in with the credentials above

confirmDelete.title: Delete tenant?
confirmDelete.body: Soft delete sets status to deleted.

impersonationRedirect.title: Redirecting to tenant …
impersonationRedirect.hint: Signing in on the tenant domain. Please wait.

errors.missing_token: No sign-in token was found in the redirect.
errors.missing_tenant: No tenant was specified in the redirect.
errors.tenant_mismatch: Tenant does not match this subdomain.
errors.not_impersonation: Token is not an impersonation token.
errors.expired: Impersonation token has expired. Start again from admin.regkasse.at.
